message:
fix: add refresh controls and hourglass indicator to Deploy dashboard (#150)

Deploy was completely missing: data hook, isRefreshing state, auto-refresh
checkbox, refresh button, and hourglass "Updating" indicator. Added
useDeployments hook, wired up useDashboard with onRefresh callback,
and added the standard header controls matching all other dashboards.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
